name: Payoneer
description: Payoneer — Global payment platform for cross-border business payments, mass payouts, and multi-currency accounts for freelancers and marketplaces.

seo.title: Payoneer — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Payoneer: Payoneer — Global payment platform for cross-border business payments, mass payouts, and multi-currency accounts for freelancers and marketplaces.

when_to_use: Mass payouts to freelancers across 190+ countries
Multi-currency accounts for global marketplace sellers
Cross-border B2B payments with competitive FX rates
Marketplace seller payout automation via Payoneer API

pros: Strong for freelancer and marketplace payouts
cons: Fees for currency conversion add up
KYC and account freezes reported often
review.verdict: De-facto global payout layer for freelancers and marketplaces, but FX costs and KYC friction are real.
review.best_for: Marketplaces and freelance platforms paying contractors across many countries
review.not_for: Merchants needing consumer checkout or ultra-low FX spreads

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
